ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle (e.g., Nissan, Tesla) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle (e.g., Leaf, Model S) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., Fully electric, Plug-in Hybrid) */,
  "seats" TEXT /* Number of seats in the vehicle */,
  "electric_range_km" TEXT /* Electric range of the vehicle in kilometers */,
  "battery_kwh" TEXT /* Battery capacity of the vehicle in kilowatt-hours */,
  "can_fast_charge" TEXT /* Whether the vehicle can fast charge */,
  "cost_used_new" TEXT /* Cost of the vehicle (used-new) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or special features about the vehicle */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory where the vehicle is listed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle model */,
  "trim_level" TEXT /* Trim level of the vehicle (e.g., base, premium, luxury) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Transmission type of the vehicle (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type of the vehicle (e.g., front-wheel drive, all-wheel drive) */,
  "fuel_efficiency" TEXT /* Fuel efficiency of the vehicle (e.g., kilometers per liter) */,
  "safety_features" TEXT /* Safety features of the vehicle (e.g., airbags, ABS) */,
  "infotainment_features" TEXT /* Infotainment features of the vehicle (e.g., Bluetooth, navigation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventories ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory */,
  "inventory_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the inventory */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership that manages the inventory */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the inventory is active or not */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealerships" (
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership */,
  "dealership_name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the dealership */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the dealership is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the dealership is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the dealership */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the dealership */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the dealership */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the dealership */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the dealership (e.g., 4.5/5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user is active or not */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "seller_dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership that sold the vehicle */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "buyer_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the buyer */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., new, used) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, credit card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_seller_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock of the vehicle model in the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "is_low_stock" INTEGER /* Whether the current stock is low or not */,
  "reorder_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for reordering the vehicle model */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the threshold is reached */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id", "vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., sunroof, heated seats) */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id", "feature_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealer_incentives" (
  "incentive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incentive */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership offering the incentive */,
  "incentive_name" TEXT /* Name of the incentive (e.g., discount, free accessory) */,
  "incentive_description" TEXT /* Description of the incentive */,
  "incentive_amount" REAL /* Amount of the incentive */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the incentive */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the incentive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incentive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dealer_incentives_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale associated with the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 4.5/5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)
